src: Theano was a Python library that allows you to define, optimize, and evaluate mathematical expressions involving multi-dimensional arrays efficiently. It is being continued as PyTensor: www.github.com/pymc-devs/pytensor
ja: Theano は多次元配列を扱う数式の定義・最適化・評価を効率的に行える Python ライブラリでした。現在は PyTensor として継続されています: www.github.com/pymc-devs/pytensor
